content: TASK-072 checkpoint done: Prototype initial render no longer pays for the normal architecture computeLayout path. render() now returns a lightweight placeholder layout for the prototype view, while the prototype map performs its own deferred map layout/mount. The map canvas first shows a small loading state, images load lazily/asynchronously, and map card insertion is batched. This directly addresses first Prototype display freezes; targeted prototype test time dropped from ~2.3s to ~13-19ms. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts, npm run build, and npm test passed. Browser verification on http://localhost:5173 was blocked by browser security policy in this session. TASK-056 broader performance remains open.
